channel.title: Anthropic on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Anthropic on Archive 03

item.title: Why Amazon Wins as AI Model Wars Intensify
item.description: Anthropic’s massive compute infrastructure deal with AWS raises a bigger question: is Amazon ($AMZN) an AI model winner, or the toll collector behind the entire race? We look at AWS, Trainium, capex, valuation, and long-term investment risks through three perspectives.
